metadata.description: Adams Mind — internal skills for product management, development, and team onboarding

plugins.description: Write user stories with acceptance criteria, edge cases, and technical considerations

plugins.description: Structured backlog refinement with prioritization, estimation, and cleanup

plugins.name: dev-testing-workflow

plugins.name: dev-debugging-guide
plugins.description: Systematic debugging workflow with root cause analysis and fix verification

plugins.name: onboard-new-engineer

plugins.description: Deep dive into codebase architecture, key modules, and design patterns
